title: quercus longipedunculata var. fastigiata
intro: Quercus longipedunculata var. fastigiata is a variety of the Quercus longipedunculata plant, commonly known as a type of oak tree, specifically characterized by its upright growth habit. The medicinal properties of Quercus longipedunculata var. fastigiata include its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of tannins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Quercus longipedunculata var. fastigiata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy lifestyle.
